## **Parent Hotspot Placement**

We recommend placing the Parent hotspot at a central location away from more precisely placed hotspots. This helps to reduce site selection confusion and ensures eBird Mobile's "Recommended Location" algorithm only suggests the parent hotspot when a GPS track spans multiple sub-hotspots or covers the broader area. 

If the group includes two or more regions (counties, states/provinces, or countries) place the Parent hotspot in the region with the most group hotspots and checklist activity. 

See also: [Plotting Hotspots](PlottingHotspots.qmd)
